summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The preflight artifact hydrated 20 of 25 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Most hydrated PRs should remain open as independent backlog items. Two secret-handling PRs are scoped to central security handling, and five listed PRs need a refreshed/hydrated preflight before classification because no artifact live state was available.
